lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have a pint of beer please.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Ok, that'll be two coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, I don't seem to have enough money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any hints on where I can go adventuring?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Well there is the Varrock sewers. There are tales of untold horrors coming out at night and stealing babies from houses.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: It's just to the east of the palace.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: I'm not that well up on the gossip out here. I've heard that the bartender in the Blue Moon Inn has gone a little crazy, he keeps claiming he is part of something called an online game.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: What that means, I don't know. That's probably old news by now though.
